calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up & Default Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Carpenter.
Michael Faifsnider, Esq. for Plaintiff: Eric Schleelein, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: John Camisa, for Court Trial.
No appearance by the Defaulted Defendant: Peter Reichart, default entered 5-12-06.
Exh. 1 - Proof of Service-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Eric Schleelein and Defaulted Defendant: Peter Reichart as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 1012 Deivisadero St., #2, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $5,229.84
Costs $545.00, for a Total of $5,774.84
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.
